description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a short barrel and a robust, cylindrical handguard. The receiver is detailed with a prominent rail system on top, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and a textured grip below for secure handling. The magazine well is integrated into the lower receiver, and the trigger guard is angular and pronounced. The muzzle is slightly flared, and the overall silhouette is reminiscent of a blaster-style firearm, with a futuristic, utilitarian aesthetic. The surface appears matte black, with subtle highlights indicating a metallic construction. There are no visible wooden or polymer components, and the stock is absent, replaced by a pistol grip configuration.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a short barrel, rail system, and pistol grip, featuring a futuristic, tactical appearance. The design is robust and metallic, with no visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the rail system, handguard, pistol grip, and muzzle details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal side features visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main profile with clear visibility of the grip, rail, and handguard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel and muzzle receding from view.
